news.summary: Semtech Corporation (NASDAQ: SMTC) based in Camarillo, California, a prominent supplier of high-performance semiconductor products, IoT systems, and cloud connectivity services, is set to present its innovative IoT solutions at the IoT Solutions World Congress (IOTSWC) scheduled to take place in Barcelona from May 13 to 15, 2025. In collaboration with the LoRa Alliance's initiative "Building Massive IoT with LoRaWAN," Semtech aims to exhibit the transformative impact of its latest LoRa technology, which marks the fourth generation, on connectivity.
news.headline: Semtech to showcase fourth-gen LoRa® tech at IoT Solutions World Congress in Barcelona, May 13-15, 2025.

news.summary: A partnership has been announced between Play2Pay and Metro by T-Mobile in Miami. Play2Pay is an innovative payment platform that adds a fun element to bill payments. Metro by T-Mobile, the largest prepaid brand in America, has collaborated with Play2Pay to introduce the Ad It Up app to its customers. This app allows customers, using iOS or Android devices, to play games and view promotions to accumulate rewards that can be utilized as credits towards their Metro service. By participating more, customers can earn more credits, leading to reduced payments for their wireless services. This collaboration aims to enhance customer engagement and provide added value to users.
news.headline: Play2Pay partners with Metro by T-Mobile to launch Ad It Up app, allowing customers to earn credits for wireless service by playing games & engaging with ads.

news.summary: Versa, a top player in Universal Secure Access Service Edge (SASE), has revealed that its VersaONE Universal SASE Platform has been recognized as a Leader and Outperformer in the GigaOm Radar Report for Security Service Edge (SSE). The report, from renowned technology research entity GigaOm, assessed 19 key security providers, categorizing them as Leaders, Challengers, or New Entrants according to their offerings. Versa's platform stood out in the evaluation, positioning it prominently in the industry.
news.headline: Versa named Leader and Outperformer in SSE, SD-WAN, and SASE by GigaOm. VersaONE platform ranked highly in report.

news.summary: WALTHAM, Mass.-- Evolv Technologies Holdings, Inc. revealed its collaboration with Rahway Public Schools in Rahway, NJ, involving the implementation of Evolv Express® and Evolv eXpedite™ systems at key entry points like the gymnasium and performing arts entrances. The use of these advanced AI-based solutions signifies a major advancement in school security for the district. The partnership announcement comes as Evolv Technologies Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVLV), a renowned security technology company, reinforces its commitment to enhancing safety measures and experiences within educational institutions.
news.headline: Rahway Public Schools partners with Evolv Technologies for safety, deploying Express and eXpedite systems for enhanced security.

news.summary: London - nVent, a prominent player in electrical connection and protection solutions, disclosed its involvement in the Wolfe Global Transportation and Industrials Conference scheduled for Thursday, May 22, 2025. The Chair and Chief Executive Officer Beth Wozniak will deliver a presentation at 2:35 p.m. Eastern Time. Those interested can access a webcast through nVent's Investor Relations website, available at https://investors.nvent.com/events-and-presentations. nVent is recognized as a top global vendor of electrical connections and protections.
news.headline: nVent Electric to join Wolfe Global Transportation and Industrials Conference on May 22, 2025. CEO to present at 2:35 pm ET. Visit nVent's IR website for webcast.

news.summary: In Chicago, the prominent cybersecurity platform for small and midsize businesses, Coro, introduced its Security Awareness Training (SAT) module. This specialized solution aims to assist SMBs in decreasing human errors, preventing phishing attacks, and showcasing compliance without requiring additional tools for management. Integrated within Coro’s comprehensive cybersecurity platform, the newly launched Security Awareness Training module offers heightened protection with simplified usability. Research shows that more than 90% of cyber breaches originate from human error, emphasizing the critical need for robust training mechanisms like Coro’s SAT module.
news.headline: Coro launches Security Awareness Training to help SMBs reduce human error and defend against phishing attacks.

Bill Gates pledged on Thursday to give away almost his entire personal wealth in the next two decades and said the world's poorest would receive some $200 billion via his foundation at a time when governments worldwide are slashing international aid..

news.summary: Brandon Perry has been appointed as the Vice President of Lending at the Texas Methodist Foundation, based in Austin, Texas.
news.headline: The Texas Methodist Foundation appoints Brandon Perry as Vice President of Lending in Austin.
BoE Gov. Bailey: The BoE growth forecast is not doom and gloom.

news.summary: Liberty Mutual Holding Company Inc. reported a net income of $1.025 billion for the first quarter of 2025, a decrease from $1.535 billion in the same period last year. Despite California wildfires driving elevated catastrophe losses, their combined ratio, including these losses and prior year development, was 96.6%. They achieved an 81.9% underlying combined ratio, marking a 6.5-point improvement. Investment income contributed $1.3 billion, and overall, the company aims to reach a 95% combined ratio goal by the end of 2025. US Retail Markets' net written premium decreased by 7.4%, while Global Risk Solutions saw an increase of 7.5%. Consolidated revenues remained relatively stable at $12.486 billion. Underlying profits before limited partnerships income rose by 40.8% to $2.711 billion. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Liberty Mutual reported Q1 net income of $1.025 billion, down from $1.535 billion in 2024, achieved a 81.9% combined ratio.

news.headline: Kensington launches accessories for Microsoft Surface Pro 1st Edition 12" in Calif, for Business professionals.

news.summary: A directory titled "Middle East Defence Industries & Authorities Directory 2025" has recently been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. This directory serves as a key resource for obtaining extensive information on defense companies and officials responsible for procurement in the Middle East region. It provides crucial data for defense contractors, aiding them in identifying new prospects in the area. This directory is essential for accessing comprehensive data on the defense sector in the Middle East.
news.headline: "Middle East Defence Industries & Authorities Directory 2025 released, key resource for defense contractors in the region - ResearchAndMarkets.com"
21Shares AG has released its Base Prospectus document.

news.summary: PVH Corp. announced the appointment of David Savman as the new Global Brand President for Calvin Klein, replacing Eva Serrano. Serrano will continue as an advisor until the year-end to aid the transition. Savman, who joined PVH in 2022, played a pivotal role in aligning the company's global brands, commercial teams, and operating strategies to enhance consumer engagement. This appointment signifies a shift in leadership for Calvin Klein under Savman's guidance.
news.headline: PVH Corp. appoints David Savman as Global Brand President, Calvin Klein, replacing Eva Serrano. Serrano to advise till year-end.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the number of confirmed cases of COVID-19 has exceeded 10,000 in the city. The total number of deaths related to the virus has reached 500. Additionally, the local authorities have announced that the vaccination campaign has successfully immunized over 70% of the population. Despite these efforts, there is a growing concern about the emergence of new variants that could potentially lead to a surge in cases. As a result, stringent measures are being implemented to prevent further spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and restrictions on social gatherings. The government is urging the public to remain vigilant and adhere to safety guidelines to combat the ongoing pandemic effectively.
news.headline: Arm's forecast falls short, adding to chipmaker caution.

news.summary: Tredegar Corporation (NYSE:TG) has released its financial results for the first quarter of 2025, ending on March 31. The net income from continuing operations for this quarter was $0.7 million ($0.02 per diluted share), a decrease from $2.6 million ($0.08 per diluted share) in the first quarter of 2024. The net income from ongoing operations, excluding special items, stood at $3.6 million ($0.10 per diluted share) in the first quarte
news.headline: Tredegar Corp reports Q1 2025 net income of $0.7M ($0.02 per share), down from $2.6M in Q1 2024. Ongoing ops income is $3.6M ($0.10 per share).

news.summary: Arcadia Biosciences, Inc. reported a 22% increase in revenues year over year, driven by a significant 90% growth in sales of Zola coconut water. The company sold patents for $750,000, eliminating $1 million in liabilities, and amended its agreement with Roosevelt to provide certainty around the exchange ratio. Total revenues for the first quarter of 2025 were $1.2 million, up from $987,000 in the previous year. Total operating expenses decreased by 74%, resulting in an income from continuing operations of $530,000, compared to a loss of $1.588 million in the same period last year. The company's net income attributable to common stockholders improved significantly. The business combination with Roosevelt is expected to be completed towards the end of the summer, pending stockholder approval.
news.headline: Arcadia Biosciences (RKDA) reports 22% revenue increase in Q1 2025, sells patents for $750K and removes $1M in liabilities. CEO pleased with Zola's 90% growth. Despite lower operating expenses, the company experienced a net loss in Q1 2025 but showed a significant improvement from Q1 2024. They are optimistic about the pending business combination with Roosevelt Resources, aiming for completion by the end of the summer following an exchange ratio agreement amendment.

news.summary: On Thursday, Dow Jones futures surged by 350 points following President Trump's announcement of a significant trade agreement with the U.K. However, Arm, a partner of Nvidia, experienced a significant drop in stock value due to earnings concerns. The positive market reaction to the trade deal was reflected in the futures market, with investors responding to the news favorably. In contrast, Arm's stock decline highlighted the impact of earnings reports on market performance. This news underscores the intricate relationship between geopolitical events and corporate financial outcomes, shaping investor sentiment and market movements.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures surge 350 points on Trump's trade deal; Nvidia partner Arm stock plunges on earnings.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Salesforce (NYSE: CRM) revealed a collaboration with certified life sciences partners in an effort to expedite client transition to Life Sciences Cloud, Salesforce's HIPAA-ready, pre-validated, GxP-compliant platform. This move allows pharmaceutical and medical technology firms to smoothly shift to Life Sciences Cloud and initiate the roll-out of Agentforce, Salesforce’s digital labor platform. This innovation aims to streamline data connectivity and enhance insights within clinical, medical, and related fields.
news.headline: Salesforce introduces Life Sciences Partner Network to boost digital programs; offers migration to Life Sciences Cloud.

news.summary: In Bozeman, Montana, FICO (NYSE: FICO), a global analytics software leader, revealed that Achieve along with its bank partner are utilizing FICO® Score 10 T on its personal loan marketplace lending platform. By employing FICO's cutting-edge scoring model, Achieve conducted pre-implementation tests which displayed a significant drop in delinquency rates. Additionally, this initiative has enabled broader access to loans for more borrowers, showcasing the score's proficiency in improving lending determinations.
news.headline: Fintech Achieve partners with FICO for loan platform, using Score 10 T to reduce delinquency rates and expand borrower access.

news.summary: Twist Bioscience Corporation (NASDAQ: TWST) located in South San Francisco, California, and Ginkgo Bioworks (NYSE: DNA) based in Boston have revealed an enhanced partnership agreement. This newly updated collaboration, stemming from their previous contract in 2022, involves a three-year deal valued at $15 million. Twist Bioscience Corporation, recognized as a core mid-cap growth and value equity company in the health care sector's life sciences segment, and Ginkgo Bioworks, a renowned entity constructing a prominent cell programming and biosecurity platform, have joined forces to advance their shared objectives.
news.headline: Twist Bioscience & Ginkgo Bioworks update collaboration with a new $15 million agreement. Details on revised 3-year contract.

news.summary: Arbitrum Gaming Ventures, formerly The Gaming Catalyst, has introduced a 200 million dollar initiative known as $ARB to boost gaming and entertainment on Arbitrum. Their initial round of investments and grants, done in collaboration with venture capital firms such as Paradigm, Framework, and BITKRAFT, amounts to 10 million dollars. This funding supports a group of skilled entrepreneurs, creative distribution strategies, and the creation of premium gaming content.
news.headline: Arbitrum Gaming Ventures invests $10M in first cohort to boost gaming and entertainment on Arbitrum with aid from VCs.

news.summary: In Hollywood, Florida, FICO World 25 announced significant achievements by FICO (NYSE: FICO). Bradesco successfully integrated the FICO® Platform, boosting fraud detection and improving digital account opening. With close to 1 billion PIX transactions monthly, the bank has lessened fraud-related customer issues by 89%. Transaction declines decreased by 25%, and real-time account initiations surged by 11%. Bradesco was honored with the 2025 FICO® Decision Industry Vanguard Award at the FICO® World conference.
news.headline: Bradesco uses AI on FICO platform, handles 1B monthly transactions, doubles approval speed, reduces fraud and rejections.

news.summary: In New York, DoubleVerify ("DV") (NYSE: DV) unveiled AI-powered pre-bid controls for Google's Search Partner Network (SPN). This release aims to provide advertisers with enhanced control, assurance, and security as they expand their campaign presence on SPN beyond Google. SPN enables brands to amplify their ad presence on third-party websites outside of Google, thereby broadening their reach. The introduction of AI-powered pre-bid controls signifies a significant advancement for advertisers seeking to optimize their advertising strategy on SPN.
news.headline: DoubleVerify launches pre-screen safety solution for Google's SPN with AI-powered controls to maximize brand protection and ROI - Business Wire.

news.summary: In Seattle, the median U.S. monthly housing payment reached a record high of $2,868 in the four weeks ending May 4. This surge is attributed to two main factors: a 1.8% year-over-year increase in home-sale prices and a weekly average mortgage rate of 6.76%, which is slightly lower than mid-April but significantly higher than pandemic-era lows. These elevated housing costs have significantly impacted individuals nationwide.
news.headline: Redfin reports record-high median monthly housing payment of $2,868, due to rising home prices and average mortgage rates.

news.summary: In New York, Lynq, a real-time yield-bearing settlement network for digital assets, revealed that Crypto.com Exchange, the top USD support exchange by spot market volume globally, has partnered with them. This collaboration marks Crypto.com Exchange as the pioneer digital asset exchange to integrate with Lynq, aiding in the rapid adoption of Lynq. Other launch partners such as B2C2, Galaxy (TSX: GLXY), and Wintermute are also working towards accelerating the adoption of Lynq. The collaboration with Crypto.com Exchange is a significant step for Lynq as they aim to boost their platform and widen their reach among users.
news.headline: Crypto.com Exchange partners with Lynq, a yield-bearing settlement network, becoming first digital exchange to integrate, joining other launch partners like B2C2 and Galaxy.

news.summary: In Hollywood, Florida, FICO (NYSE: FICO) recently unveiled the champions of its new awards honoring exceptional work in applying advanced analytics and artificial intelligence to credit decision-making and fraud identification. The winners, chosen from North America, Europe Middle East and Africa, Asia-Pacific, and Latin America, will be recognized at FICO® World 2025. The event showcased the achievements of individuals who have excelled in operationalizing advanced analytics and AI for these crucial purposes.
news.headline: FICO recognizes 4 leaders in analytics and digital transformation at FICO World 2025, representing 4 global regions.

news.summary: In Toronto, Una Software, a company transforming Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A) with AI-driven, performance-focused planning, revealed its upcoming product advancements at the 2025 Gartner CFO & Finance Executive Conference on May 20-21 in National Harbor, Maryland. Crafted by an experienced leadership unit known for establishing prosperous FP&A and financial software enterprises, Una merges extensive field knowledge with an innovative perspective.
news.headline: Una Software unveils AI innovations in FP&A at 2025 Gartner CFO Conference. Additional funding announced.

news.summary: In Ann Arbor, Michigan, NSF has introduced the Checked by NSF seal in Latin America to ensure food safety and hygiene standards. This seal is in line with the FDA Food Code 2022 and local laws. It enables food businesses like restaurants and hotels to show their dedication to food safety. The seal aims to reassure customers about the quality of food establishments. No specific numbers were provided in the excerpt.
news.headline: NSF introduces Checked by NSF™ program in Latin America for food safety verification, aligning with FDA Food Code 2022.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, Wells Fargo partnered with Operation HOPE, a nonprofit focused on financial empowerment for underserved communities, to launch HOPE Inside for Small Business. This initiative offers free financial coaching and assistance to small business clients in select markets. Initially rolled out in Baldwin Hills and Van Nuys neighborhoods in Los Angeles, California, as well as Charlotte, North Carolina, the program is an extension of the existing HOPE Inside program that supports communities.
news.headline: Wells Fargo and Operation HOPE offer free financial coaching for small businesses in LA and Charlotte.

news.summary: The company is in the process of expanding its trial sites and collaborating with study investigators to recruit more participants.
news.headline: IMUNON starts Phase 3 trial for IMNN-001 in ovarian cancer, with 1st site initiated and enrolling participants.

news.summary: StepStone Group Inc. revealed that they will be announcing their financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on March 31, 2025, post-market closure on May 22, 2025. The announcement is set to be made by StepStone Group Inc. (Nasdaq: STEP).
news.headline: StepStone Group (Nasdaq: STEP) to reveal Q4 and FY2025 results on May 22, 2025.

news.summary: In 2025, additional financial support of $3.0 million by Dr. Song complements the previous funding efforts of AlpineBrook Capital, which had already provided $5.5 million in funding and gained $4 million in commitments through convertible notes.
news.headline: NKGen Biotech CEO Paul Y. Song invests $2.65M, with $3M funding from AlpineBrook Capital in 2025, adding to previous investments totaling over $9.5M.
